task: I want to enrich the software-engineer specialist with Astro framework knowledge. Walk me through how you'd do this — check for configs, determine the best source, and describe the install steps. Don't actually run anything.
expect: Checks the skill-seekers API for an existing Astro config
Checks for llms.txt or llms-full.txt on the Astro docs site as a fast alternative
Describes the scrape or create command with correct flags (-p standard --enhance-level 0)
Shows the install path into software-engineer/references/astro.md
Mentions registering the new reference in the specialist's SKILL.md

task: Build a skill from this URL: https://docs.stripe.com/payments. Target specialist: software-engineer. Walk through source reachability checks and the full process. Don't actually run the commands.
expect: Runs source reachability check (llms.txt first, then SSR test)
Uses skill-seekers scrape (not create) for URL sources due to the known KeyError bug
Checks output size and recommends --max-pages 500 if thin
Describes the install and registration steps

task: I want to enrich the devops specialist with knowledge from the GitHub repo 'pulumi/pulumi'. Describe the process including any gotchas.
expect: Uses skill-seekers create with the owner/repo format
Mentions --local-repo-path option if repo is already cloned
Uses correct preset and enhance flags
Identifies the correct target path in devops/references/
Notes that output lands in output/<name>/SKILL.md
